UserProgress.title: UserProgress
UserProgress.description: Tracks the overall progress, streaks, and aggregated performance for a local, anonymous user within the application, adhering to the privacy-first philosophy.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProgress entity.

lastActiveDate.description: Timestamp of the last time the user interacted with the application.

totalChallengesCompleted.description: Total count of challenges successfully completed by the user.

currentStreak.description: Number of consecutive days/sessions the user has completed challenges.

longestStreak.description: The maximum consecutive streak of challenge completions achieved by the user.

totalTimeSpentSeconds.description: Total cumulative time, in seconds, the user has spent engaging in challenges.

skillLevel.description: The user's self-reported skill level for challenge tailoring.

ageGroup.description: The user's age group for psychomotor pedagogical tailoring (2-5y, 6-12y, 13y+).

UrbanElement.title: UrbanElement
UrbanElement.description: Represents a type of architectural element found in urban environments that the UrbeLudo app can detect and utilize for psychomotor challenges.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UrbanElement entity (e.g., 'sidewalk_curb', 'stairs').

name.description: Human-readable name of the urban element (e.g., 'Guia de Calçada', 'Degraus').

description.description: A detailed description of the urban element and its typical characteristics.

iconSvg.description: SVG code for a visual representation of the urban element, used in the UI.

ChallengeDefinition.title: ChallengeDefinition
ChallengeDefinition.description: Defines a template for a psychomotor challenge, potentially generated by AI, which users can undertake using detected urban elements.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ChallengeDefinition entity.

name.description: Concise name of the challenge (e.g., 'Equilíbrio na Linha').

description.description: Detailed instructions and purpose of the challenge.

objective.description: The psychomotor skill targeted by the challenge (e.g., 'balance', 'muscle_tone', 'laterality', 'spatial_structuring').

targetElementIds.description: References to UrbanElement IDs that are suitable for this challenge. (Relationship: UrbanElement N:N ChallengeDefinition)

difficultyLevel.description: The perceived difficulty level of the challenge (e.g., 'easy', 'medium', 'hard').

suggestedDurationSeconds.description: The recommended duration in seconds for a user to complete this challenge.

generatedByAI.description: Indicates if this challenge definition was dynamically generated by the AI tool.

ChallengeActivity.title: ChallengeActivity
ChallengeActivity.description: Records a specific instance of a user attempting or completing a ChallengeDefinition, including performance metrics and interaction details.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ChallengeActivity entity.

userProgressId.description: Reference to the UserProgress entity associated with this activity. (Relationship: UserProgress 1:N ChallengeActivity)

challengeDefinitionId.description: Reference to the ChallengeDefinition entity that this activity is an instance of. (Relationship: ChallengeDefinition 1:N ChallengeActivity)

startTime.description: Timestamp when the user started this specific challenge activity.

endTime.description: Timestamp when the user completed or abandoned this specific challenge activity.

durationSeconds.description: The actual duration in seconds the user spent on this challenge activity.

isCompleted.description: Indicates whether the user successfully completed the challenge instance.

feedbackScore.description: Optional numerical score or rating given to the user's performance for this activity.

detectedElementIds.description: References to UrbanElement IDs that were specifically detected and utilized during this challenge activity. (Relationship: UrbanElement N:N ChallengeActivity)

definition.description: A collection storing static definitions of urban architectural elements. These documents are publicly readable and serve as reference data for the application. No user-specific authorization is required for reading. Write access would be restricted to administrators.

A collection containing definitions and templates for psychomotor challenges. These challenges are globally available and publicly readable. Write access would be restricted to administrators or AI tools responsible for generating new challenge definitions.

A collection storing each anonymous user's overall progress, streaks, and aggregated performance. Each document's ID (`userId`) corresponds to the Firebase Authentication UID (`request.auth.uid`) of the anonymous user. Access is strictly limited to the owner (the authenticated user themselves) for read and write operations. This collection implements path-based ownership for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The Firebase Authentication UID of the anonymous user, which also serves as the document ID for their UserProgress.

definition.description: A subcollection under each user's progress document, detailing individual instances of challenges undertaken by that user. Each activity includes a denormalized `userProgressId` field that must match the `userId` in the path to ensure authorization independence and data integrity. Access is strictly limited to the owner (the authenticated user themselves) for read and write operations, leveraging hierarchical path-based ownership.

params.name: userId
params.description: The Firebase Authentication UID of the anonymous user, serving as the parent document's ID in `user_progress`.

params.name: challengeActivityId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific ChallengeActivity instance.

firestore.reasoning: The Firestore structure for UrbeLudo is designed with a strong emphasis on authorization independence, structural segregation, and adherence to the privacy-first principle using Firebase anonymous authentication.
